summary:
Daily atemoya juice intake has no known effect on CYP1A2 activity based on available literature; it lacks documented interactions with this enzyme system unlike other fruit juices such as grapefruit juice affecting different cytochrome P450 enzymes. Therefore, it does not alter the pharmacokinetics of CYP1A2 substrate drugs.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
